# Declarations

## CRediT authorship contribution statement

**Francis Tsiboe:** Conceptualization, Methodology, Software, Formal analysis, Data curation, Visualization, Writing -- original draft, Writing -- review & editing. **Mark Appiah-Twumasi:** Conceptualization, Writing -- original draft, Writing -- review & editing, Project administration. **Antoinette Tsiboe-Darko:** Writing -- original draft, Writing -- review & editing. **Sylvanus Gaku:** Formal analysis, Writing -- review & editing.

## Declaration of competing interest

The authors declare that they have no known competing financial interests or personal relationships that could have appeared to influence the work reported in this paper.

## Funding

This research did not receive any specific grant from funding agencies in the public, commercial, or not-for-profit sectors.

## Data availability

The study uses the fourth through seventh rounds of the Ghana Living Standards Survey (GLSS 4--7), collected by the Ghana Statistical Service and available from the Ghana Statistical Service microdata catalog. The community-level extraction indicators are constructed from the GLSS community questionnaires as described in Section 2.

## Code availability

The full replication pipeline (data assembly, matching, meta-stochastic frontier estimation, and exhibit generation) is available at <https://github.com/ftsiboe/okwaayeli/tree/main/studies/resource_extraction>.

## Disclaimer

The findings and conclusions in this manuscript are those of the authors and should not be construed to represent the views or policies of their respective institutions.
